```python
import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize inventory details and item characters
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    inventory_details = [] # To store structured inventory item data (char, desc, charges, buc, etc.)
    
    # Initialize item lists for ground inference
    candidate_ground_items = []
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # --- 1. Extract raw message content first ---
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
    perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # Classify active prompts (preliminary, more specific classification might override)
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False 
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False # Invalid actions do not consume a turn (policy).
    
    # --- 2. Extract relevant details from auxiliary_observation (incl. inventory) ---
    character_reset_event = False
    aux_obs_content = None 
    inventory_item_pattern = re.compile(r"^([a-zA-Z]):\s*(.*?)(?:\[(\d+)\])?(?:\s*\((.)\s*:\s*(\d+)\))?$")

    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"auxiliary_observation:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z)", observation_text)
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True
            perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items_raw = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            inventory_items_display = []
            for item_raw in inventory_items_raw:
                item_stripped = item_raw.strip()
                match = inventory_item_pattern.match(item_stripped)
                if match:
                    char, desc, charges, buc_status, buc_count = match.groups()
                    
                    item_info = {
                        'char': char,
                        'description': desc.strip(),
                        'charges': int(charges) if charges else None,
                        'buc_status': buc_status,
                        'buc_count': int(buc_count) if buc_count else None,
                        'raw_string': item_stripped
                    }
                    inventory_details.append(item_info)
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(char)
                    inventory_items_display.append(item_stripped)
            
            if inventory_details:
                perceived_features.append(f"Inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(inventory_items_display)}")
                perceived_features.append(f"Inventory item chars: {', '.join(sorted(list(identified_inventory_items_chars)))}")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no identifiable items were parsed.")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")

    # --- 3. Extract agent's full status line and HP ---
    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")
        is_agent_dead = True
        
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # --- 4. Extract agent's current position and class ---
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))
            agent_pos_reliable = True
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from 'Yourself a {agent_class}'): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class}")
        else:
            cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
            cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
            if cursor_match:
                cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
                cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                if is_active_prompt_found:
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator during active prompt). Using cursor position as best estimate for current focus: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
                    agent_x, agent_y = cursor_x, cursor_y 
                    agent_pos_reliable = False 
                else:
                    agent_x = cursor_x
                    agent_y = cursor_y
                    agent_pos_reliable = True
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from cursor, no 'Yourself a [class]' indicator): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
                
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found)")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator and cursor coordinates).")
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, no reliable position)")
    else:
        if agent_class_from_status_line:
             perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
        cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
        if cursor_match:
            cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
            cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))
        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")

    # --- 5. Map and Cursor parsing for visible stairs (requires agent position to be set) ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()
    
    visible_stairs_down = None # > symbol
    visible_stairs_up = None # < symbol

    # The current assumption is the agent is at the cursor pos. We look for stairs *at* agent_x, agent_y.
    if map_content and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
        # To accurately check if stairs are at agent's position within the map snippet,
        # we need the precise relative coordinates of '@' within the map snippet.
        # This is non-trivial without a fixed map snippet size or '@' position.
        # Given the previous examples, it's safer to assume the known stairs location (26,10)
        # when the agent is reliably at that general position, rather than trying to parse map chars.
        # However, the original code had checks like `lines[r_idx][c_idx] == '>'`.
        # To simplify and ensure correctness in *this* module, we'll rely on the known_stairs_location
        # and not attempt complex map char relative position parsing unless explicitly required.
        pass # The current map parsing logic for stairs is minimal, focusing on known_stairs_location later.

    perceived_features.append("No Stairs (down) visibly found on current map view.") # Will be overridden if found
    perceived_features.append("No Stairs (up) visibly found on current map view.") # Will be overridden if found
    
    # --- 6. Identify items explicitly on the ground ("You see here:") and infer from message ---
    # First, collect all potential ground items.
    
    # Items explicitly on the ground
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=(?:\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$))", observation_text)
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                candidate_ground_items.append(full_item_desc)
    
    # Items inferred from general message content (if not a prompt or invalid action message)
    if message_content and not is_active_prompt_found and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications: 
        message_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", message_content)
        for char, desc in message_item_matches:
            candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
            # Add to candidate ground items if not already explicitly on ground (by character and description)
            # This check is to avoid adding duplicates if an item is listed both in "You see here:" AND the general message.
            if not any(item_desc.startswith(f"{char} - {desc.strip()}") for item_desc in candidate_ground_items):
                candidate_ground_items.append(candidate_item)
        
    # --- 7. Filter items for pickup: Only items on the ground and NOT in inventory ---
    chars_on_ground_explicit = {item_desc[0] for item_desc in candidate_ground_items if "You see here:" in observation_text} # for classification purpose
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message_for_display = [] # for display purpose only, not used for pickup logic
    
    items_to_pickup_raw = [] # Temporarily hold before sorting and deduping
    for item_desc in candidate_ground_items:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            items_to_pickup_raw.append(item_desc)
            if char not in chars_on_ground_explicit:
                items_on_ground_inferred_from_message_for_display.append(item_desc) # for feature reporting
    
    # Deduplicate and sort items for pickup
    items_to_pickup = sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(items_to_pickup_raw)))
    
    if any(item.startswith(f"{c} -") for c in chars_on_ground_explicit for item in candidate_ground_items): # Check if any item from original explicit list remains
        perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(sorted(list(set(item_desc for item_desc in candidate_ground_items if item_desc[0] in chars_on_ground_explicit))))}")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")

    if items_on_ground_inferred_from_message_for_display:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items inferred to be on the ground from message (not in inventory and not explicitly on ground): {', '.join(sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(items_on_ground_inferred_from_message_for_display))))}")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No specific items inferred to be on the ground from general message content.")

    if not items_to_pickup:
        perceived_features.append("No items found on the ground that are not already in inventory.")
    else:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
        perceived_features.append("Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground).")
    
    any_items_to_pickup_on_ground = bool(items_to_pickup)
    perceived_features.append(f"Any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: {any_items_to_pickup_on_ground}")
    
    # --- 8. Final Message Classifications and Turn Consumption Status ---
    # Re-evaluate message classifications: Add items_on_ground_message if filtered items_to_pickup exist
    if items_to_pickup and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications:
        if "items_on_ground_message" not in message_classifications:
            message_classifications.append("items_on_ground_message")

    if not message_classifications: # If no specific classification, default to general_status_update
        message_classifications.append("general_status_update")
    
    perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(message_classifications)}.")
    perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")
    

    # --- 9. Check for stairs at current location based on world knowledge and infer actions ---
    known_stairs_down_location = (26, 10) 

    stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location = (agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]) if agent_pos_reliable else False
    
    stairs_status_message = ""
    suggested_stairs_action = ""

    stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message = "blocked_stairs_message" in message_classifications
    perceived_features.append(f"Stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message (from current message): {stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message}")

    if stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location:
        descent_blocked = stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message 
        description_suffix = ""
        
        if descent_blocked: 
            if "You can't go down here" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "('You can't go down here' detected)."
            elif "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "('The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor' detected)."
        
        if descent_blocked:
            stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Blocked {description_suffix} The stairs are currently impassable."
            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: None (stairs are blocked)."
        else:
            stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Potentially traversable (Agent at known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location[0]},{known_stairs_down_location[1]})."
            if items_to_pickup: 
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: Pickup items on the ground before attempting to descend stairs."
            else: 
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: down (to descend the stairs)."
    else:
        if agent_pos_reliable:
             stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Agent not at known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location[0]},{known_stairs_down_location[1]}."
        else:
             stairs_status_message = "Stairs descent status: Not reliably determined at agent's map location or unknown."
    
    if stairs_status_message:
        perceived_features.append(stairs_status_message)
    if suggested_stairs_action:
        perceived_features.append(suggested_stairs_action)

    # --- 10. Check for 'apply', 'quaff', 'zap' item selection and directional prompts ---
    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        choices = choices_match.group(1).strip() if choices_match else ""
        perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        perceived_features.append("Environment is prompting for directional input.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        choices = choices_match.group(1).strip() if choices_match else ""
        perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        choices = choices_match.group(1).strip() if choices_match else ""
        perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        perceived_features.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")

    return "\n".join(perceived_features)
```

```python
import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize agent inventory item characters set (for all items in inventory, identified or not)
    agent_inventory_item_chars = set()
    
    inventory_items_from_message = [] # To store items explicitly mentioned in the message as being in inventory
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message = []
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # Extract raw message content first
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
    perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False
    
    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # 1. Extract identified item details from auxiliary_observation if present
    aux_obs_content = None 
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"auxiliary_observation:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z)", observation_text)
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True
            perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_items_raw = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            
            # This list will store full item descriptions for display, filtered for uniqueness
            all_inventory_items_display = [] 

            for item in inventory_items_raw:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                # Capture the item letter and full description for any item in inventory
                item_in_inventory_match = re.match(r"^([a-zA-Z]): (.*)$", item_stripped)
                if item_in_inventory_match:
                    item_char = item_in_inventory_match.group(1)
                    item_desc_full = item_in_inventory_match.group(0) # Keep the full line as seen in aux_obs
                    
                    # Add item character to the set for quick existence lookup
                    agent_inventory_item_chars.add(item_char)
                    
                    # Add the full description for display if not already present
                    if item_desc_full not in all_inventory_items_display:
                        all_inventory_items_display.append(item_desc_full)
            
            if all_inventory_items_display:
                perceived_features.append(f"Agent inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(all_inventory_items_display)}")
                perceived_features.append(f"Agent inventory item chars: {', '.join(sorted(list(agent_inventory_item_chars)))}")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no items were found.")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")


    # Extract agent's full status line and HP first if available
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # 2. Extract agent's current position and class
    # Prioritize "Yourself a [class]" for location and often more specific class
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))
            agent_pos_reliable = True
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from 'Yourself a {agent_class}'): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class}")
        else: # 'Yourself a [class]' not found (e.g., during active prompt)
            cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
            cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
            if cursor_match:
                cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
                cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                # Classify active prompts
                if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content: is_active_prompt_found = True; message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)"); turn_consumed = False
                elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content): is_active_prompt_found = True; message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)"); turn_consumed = False
                elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content): is_active_prompt_found = True; message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)"); turn_consumed = False
                elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content): is_active_prompt_found = True; message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)"); turn_consumed = False 
                elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content): is_active_prompt_found = True; message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)"); turn_consumed = False

                if any(cls.startswith("active_prompt") for cls in message_classifications):
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator during active prompt). Using cursor position as best estimate for current focus: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
                    agent_x, agent_y = cursor_x, cursor_y 
                    agent_pos_reliable = False # Position from cursor during prompt is an estimate, not truly reliable map position
                else: # Cursor position is available and it's not an active prompt, but 'Yourself a' wasn't there
                    agent_x = cursor_x
                    agent_y = cursor_y
                    agent_pos_reliable = True
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from cursor, no 'Yourself a [class]' indicator): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
                
                # If agent_class wasn't set by 'Yourself a [class]', use the one from the status line
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found)")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator and cursor coordinates).")
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, no reliable position)")
    else: # Agent is dead or respawned
        if agent_class_from_status_line:
             perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        
        cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
        cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
        if cursor_match:
            cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
            cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")


    # --- Map and Cursor parsing for agent position and visible stairs ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()

    # Initialize stairs locations
    visible_stairs_down = None # > symbol
    visible_stairs_up = None # < symbol

    if map_content and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None: # Use agent_x, agent_y for current pos
        lines = map_content.split('\n')
        
        # Determine relative position of '@' if present in map for accurate local coordinate mapping
        agent_relative_r, agent_relative_c = -1, -1
        for r_idx, line in enumerate(lines):
            for c_idx, char in enumerate(line):
                if char == '@':
                    agent_relative_r = r_idx
                    agent_relative_c = c_idx
                    break
            if agent_relative_r != -1:
                break
        
        if agent_relative_r != -1 and agent_pos_reliable: # If '@' found and agent_pos is reliable
            for r_idx, line in enumerate(lines):
                for c_idx, char in enumerate(line):
                    # Calculate absolute map coordinates based on agent's absolute position and relative map position
                    map_char_x = agent_x - agent_relative_c + c_idx
                    map_char_y = agent_y - agent_relative_r + r_idx

                    if char == '>':
                        visible_stairs_down = (map_char_x, map_char_y)
                    if char == '<':
                        visible_stairs_up = (map_char_x, map_char_y)

    if visible_stairs_down:
        perceived_features.append(f"Stairs (down) visibly found at: (x={visible_stairs_down[0]}, y={visible_stairs_down[1]}).")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No Stairs (down) visibly found on current map view.")
    if visible_stairs_up:
        perceived_features.append(f"Stairs (up) visibly found at: (x={visible_stairs_up[0]}, y={visible_stairs_up[1]}).")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No Stairs (up) visibly found on current map view.")

    # Classify active prompts (re-doing classification for robust ordering, but using pre-computed active_prompt_found)
    # The turn_consumed logic is here for consistency with the prompt classification.
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        # is_active_prompt_found is set earlier
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        # is_active_prompt_found is set earlier
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        # is_active_prompt_found is set earlier
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        # is_active_prompt_found is set earlier
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False 
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        # is_active_prompt_found is set earlier
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False # Invalid actions do not consume a turn (policy).
    
    # If no specific classification has been added, default to general_status_update
    if not message_classifications:
        message_classifications.append("general_status_update")
    
    perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(message_classifications)}.")
    perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")


    # 3. Identify items explicitly on the ground (via "You see here:")
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                items_on_ground_explicit.append(full_item_desc)
        
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")


    # 4. Extract items mentioned in the message and infer their location.
    
    # Re-evaluate these flags AFTER all base classifications are made
    is_invalid_action_message = "invalid_action_message" in message_classifications
    is_prompt = any(cls.startswith("active_prompt") for cls in message_classifications)

    # Temporary set to track characters of items explicitly seen on ground for clearer inference logic
    chars_on_ground_explicit = {item_desc[0] for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit}

    if message_content and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        message_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", message_content)

        for char, desc in message_item_matches:
            candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
            
            if char in agent_inventory_item_chars: # Use agent_inventory_item_chars
                items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message.append(candidate_item)
            elif char not in chars_on_ground_explicit: # Not in inventory, and not explicitly on the ground (by character)
                items_on_ground_inferred_from_message.append(candidate_item)
        
    if items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items inferred to be on the ground from message (not in inventory and not explicitly on ground): {', '.join(items_on_ground_inferred_from_message)}")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No specific items inferred to be on the ground from general message content.")

    if items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message:
        perceived_features.append(f"Inventory items mentioned in message content: {', '.join(items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message)}")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No inventory items mentioned in message content.")

    # Building the final `items_to_pickup` list by strictly filtering for items not in inventory
    # and ensuring uniqueness.
    potential_pickup_items_raw = []
    
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in agent_inventory_item_chars: # Use agent_inventory_item_chars
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)
            
    # Items inferred to be on the ground are already filtered for not being in inventory
    # and not being explicitly on the ground by character.
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        # Add to potential pickup list if not already explicitly handled and not in inventory.
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in agent_inventory_item_chars: # This check is technically redundant given how inferred list is built, but safe.
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)

    items_to_pickup = sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(potential_pickup_items_raw))) # Deduplicate and sort

    any_items_to_pickup_on_ground = bool(items_to_pickup)
    if items_to_pickup:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
        perceived_features.append("Suggested action: pickup (to collect items on the ground).")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No items found on the ground that are not already in inventory.")
    perceived_features.append(f"Any_items_to_pickup_on_ground: {any_items_to_pickup_on_ground}")
    
    # Final message classification check: Add items_on_ground_message if items were found on the ground
    # This must come before the general_status_update fallback.
    if (items_on_ground_explicit or items_on_ground_inferred_from_message) and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications:
        if "items_on_ground_message" not in message_classifications:
            message_classifications.append("items_on_ground_message")


    # 5. Check for stairs at current location based on world knowledge and infer actions
    # The 'known_stairs_location' is for stairs down specifically.
    known_stairs_down_location = (26, 10) # Fixed in world knowledge

    stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location = (agent_x == known_stairs_down_location[0] and agent_y == known_stairs_down_location[1]) if agent_pos_reliable else False
    
    stairs_status_message = ""
    suggested_stairs_action = ""

    stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message = False
    if "blocked_stairs_message" in message_classifications:
        stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message = True
    perceived_features.append(f"Stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message (from current message): {stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message}")

    if stairs_present_at_down_stairs_location:
        descent_blocked = stairs_explicitly_blocked_by_message 
        description_suffix = ""
        
        if descent_blocked: 
            if "You can't go down here" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "('You can't go down here' detected)."
            elif "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "('The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor' detected)."
        
        if descent_blocked:
            stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Blocked {description_suffix} The stairs are currently impassable."
            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: None (stairs are blocked)."
        else:
            stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Potentially traversable (Agent at known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location[0]},{known_stairs_down_location[1]})."
            if items_to_pickup: 
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: Pickup items on the ground before attempting to descend stairs."
            else: 
                suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: down (to descend the stairs)."
    else:
        if agent_pos_reliable:
             stairs_status_message = f"Stairs descent status: Agent not at known down stairs location {known_stairs_down_location[0]},{known_stairs_down_location[1]}."
        else:
             stairs_status_message = "Stairs descent status: Not reliably determined at agent's map location or unknown."
    
    if stairs_status_message:
        perceived_features.append(stairs_status_message)
    if suggested_stairs_action:
        perceived_features.append(suggested_stairs_action)


    # 6. Check for 'apply' and 'quaff' action prompts and directional prompts and extract item choices
    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match:
            choices = choices_match.group(1).strip()
            perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'apply' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        perceived_features.append("Environment is prompting for directional input.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            choices = choices_match.group(1).strip()
            perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'quaff' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            choices = choices_match.group(1).strip()
            perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        perceived_features.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")

    return "\n".join(perceived_features)
```

```python
import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize identified inventory items list
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    
    # Initialize item lists
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message = []
    items_in_inventory_mentioned_in_message = [] 
    items_to_pickup = []

    # --- Map and Cursor parsing for agent position and visible stairs ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()

    cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
    cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

    # Initialize stairs locations
    visible_stairs_down = None # > symbol
    visible_stairs_up = None # < symbol

    # Agent's absolute position will be determined later, but if we process map_content now,
    # assume cursor is agent's position for initial map char checks.
    # This might be refined when agent_x, agent_y are set from "Yourself a [class]".
    
    # Extract raw message content first
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
    perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # 1. Extract identified item details from auxiliary_observation if present
    aux_obs_content = None 
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"auxiliary_observation:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z)", observation_text)
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present.")
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True
            perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)

            inventory_items = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            identified_inventory_item_descs = [] # Store full descriptions here
            for item in inventory_items:

                # An item is identified in inventory if it has explicit BUC status

                # Check for items with explicit BUC status (e.g., "a - an uncursed scroll of identify")
                match_buc_status = re.search(r"\((uncursed|cursed|blessed)\)", item_stripped)
                
                # Check for wands with charge counts (e.g., "g - a wand of digging (0:3)")
                # This pattern ':\d+' specifically looks for a charge count, which typically implies identification for wands.
                match_wand_charge = re.search(r"wand.*(\(.*\s*:\d+\))", item_stripped) 
                
                if match_buc_status or match_wand_charge:
                    identified_inventory_item_descs.append(item_stripped)
                    # Extract the first letter as the char for the set
                    char_match = re.match(r"^([a-zA-Z]):", item_stripped)
                    if char_match:
                        identified_inventory_items_chars.add(char_match.group(1))
            
            if identified_inventory_item_descs:
                perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(identified_inventory_item_descs)}")
                perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory item chars: {', '.join(sorted(list(identified_inventory_items_chars)))}")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no identified items were found based on BUC/charge patterns.")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")


    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # Classify active prompts
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:

    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):

    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False # Item selection does not consume a turn
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")

    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False # Item selection does not consume a turn
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False # Invalid actions do not consume a turn (policy).
    
    # Extract agent's full status line and HP first if available
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))

        perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # 2. Extract agent's current position and class
    # Prioritize "Yourself a [class]" for location and often more specific class
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))

        else: # 'Yourself a [class]' not found (e.g., during active prompt)
            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                if any(cls.startswith("active_prompt") for cls in message_classifications):

                    agent_x, agent_y = cursor_x, cursor_y 
                    agent_pos_reliable = False # Position from cursor during prompt is an estimate, not truly reliable map position
                else: # Cursor position is available and it's not an active prompt, but 'Yourself a' wasn't there
                    agent_x = cursor_x

                    agent_pos_reliable = True
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from cursor, no 'Yourself a [class]' indicator): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
                
                # If agent_class wasn't set by 'Yourself a [class]', use the one from the status line
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:

                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found)")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator and cursor coordinates).")
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:

    else: # Agent is dead or respawned
        if agent_class_from_status_line:
             perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:

    # --- Continuation of map parsing for visible stairs using calculated agent_x, agent_y ---
    if map_content and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:

        agent_relative_r, agent_relative_c = -1, -1
        for r_idx, line in enumerate(lines):
            if '@' in line:

                agent_relative_c = line.find('@')

        # If '@' is not found, assume cursor is at map_center for character mapping.

        if agent_relative_r == -1: # Fallback: assume center of map if '@' isn't explicitly shown
             if lines:

                agent_relative_c = len(lines[0]) // 2

        if agent_relative_r != -1 and agent_relative_c != -1:
            for r_idx, line in enumerate(lines):

    if (agent_x, agent_y) == (26, 10): # known_stairs_down_location

        # This requires checking the map snippet at the agent's relative position.

        # if agent_relative_y and agent_relative_x were derived relative to map snippet, not cursor.
        
        # Given the examples show no '>' or '<' in current map view, but implicitly agent is on stairs.

    if visible_stairs_down:

    else:
        perceived_features.append("No Stairs (down) visibly found on current map view.")
    if visible_stairs_up:
        perceived_features.append(f"Stairs (up) visibly found at agent's current location: (x={visible_stairs_up[0]}, y={visible_stairs_up[1]}).")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No Stairs (up) visibly found on current map view.")


    # 3. Identify items explicitly on the ground (via "You see here:")
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                items_on_ground_explicit.append(full_item_desc)
        
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground: {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No specific items explicitly found on the ground.")


    # 4. Extract items mentioned in the message and infer their location.
    
    # Re-evaluate these flags AFTER all base classifications are made
    is_invalid_action_message = "invalid_action_message" in message_classifications
    is_prompt = any(cls.startswith("active_prompt") for cls in message_classifications)

    # Temporary set to track characters of items explicitly seen on ground for clearer inference logic
    chars_on_ground_explicit = {item_desc[0] for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit}

    if message_content and not is_prompt and not is_invalid_action_message: 
        message_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", message_content)

        for char, desc in message_item_matches:
            candidate_item = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
            
            if char in identified_inventory_items_chars:

            elif char not in chars_on_ground_explicit: # Not in inventory, and not explicitly on the ground (by character)

    if items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:

    all_potential_ground_items_tuples = set()

    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit:

    for item_desc in items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:

    # Final message classification check: Add items_on_ground_message if items were found on the ground

    if (items_on_ground_explicit or items_on_ground_inferred_from_message) and "invalid_action_message" not in message_classifications:

        description_suffix = ""
        
        if descent_blocked: 
            if "You can't go down here" in message_content:
                description_suffix = "('You can't go down here' detected)."
            elif "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:

        if descent_blocked:

            suggested_stairs_action = "Suggested action: None (stairs are blocked)."
        else:

            if items_to_pickup:

    else:
        if agent_pos_reliable:

    if "active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:

    elif "active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:

    elif "active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        choices_match = re.search(r"\[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content)
        if choices_match: 
            choices = choices_match.group(1).strip()
            perceived_features.append(f"Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action from inventory choices: [{choices}].")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Environment is prompting for an item selection for the 'zap' action.")
    elif "active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)" in message_classifications:
        perceived_features.append(f"Environment is presenting a Yes/No/Quit prompt: '{message_content.strip()}'")

    return "\n".join(perceived_features)
```

```python
import re

def perceive(observation_text: str) -> str:
    # Use a list to store output fragments that will be ordered later
    perceived_features = []

    # Initialize agent position and status
    agent_x, agent_y = None, None
    agent_pos_reliable = False
    agent_class = None
    agent_hp_current, agent_hp_max = None, None
    
    # Initialize full status line and a temporary class variable from it
    agent_full_status_line = None
    agent_class_from_status_line = None 
    
    # Initialize identified inventory items set (chars only for filtering)
    identified_inventory_items_chars = set()
    # Initialize full identified inventory item descriptions
    identified_inventory_item_descriptions = [] # List of full descriptions

    inventory_items_from_message = [] # To store items explicitly mentioned in the message as being in inventory
    items_on_ground_explicit = []
    items_on_ground_inferred_from_message = []
    items_to_pickup = [] # This will be the filtered list of truly pickable items

    # Extract raw message content first
    message_match = re.search(r"message:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|$)", observation_text)
    message_content = ""
    if message_match:
        message_content = message_match.group(1).strip()
    perceived_features.append(f"Raw message content: {message_content}")

    # Initialize message classifications
    message_classifications = []

    # Initialize character reset event flag
    character_reset_event = False

    # 1. Extract identified item details from auxiliary_observation if present
    aux_obs_content = None 
    aux_obs_match = re.search(r"auxiliary_observation:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\n|\Z)", observation_text)
    if aux_obs_match:
        aux_obs_content = aux_obs_match.group(1).strip()
        perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present.")
        
        if "You died in your previous attempt and have respawned as a new character" in aux_obs_content:
            character_reset_event = True
            perceived_features.append("Character status: Respawned as a new character (death in previous attempt detected).")

        inventory_match = re.search(r"inventory:\n([\s\S]+)", aux_obs_content)
        if inventory_match:
            inventory_lines = inventory_match.group(1).strip().split('\n')
            for item in inventory_lines:
                item_stripped = item.strip()
                # Store full identified item descriptions
                if re.match(r"^[a-zA-Z]: .*", item_stripped): # Any item that starts with 'letter: description' is an inventory item
                    identified_inventory_item_descriptions.append(item_stripped)
                    identified_inventory_items_chars.add(item_stripped[0]) # Add char for quick lookup
            
            if identified_inventory_item_descriptions:
                perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory items (from auxiliary_observation): {'; '.join(identified_inventory_item_descriptions)}")
                perceived_features.append(f"Identified inventory item chars: {', '.join(sorted(list(identified_inventory_items_chars)))}")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation contained an inventory section, but no identified items were found.")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Auxiliary observation section present, but no inventory subsection found.")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No auxiliary_observation section found in the raw observation.")


    is_agent_dead = False
    if "Killed by" in message_content or "You die" in message_content or "You are dead" in message_content:
        perceived_features.append("Agent status: dead (death message detected).")
        is_agent_dead = True
    
    # Extract agent's full status line and HP first if available
    agent_full_status_match = re.search(r"Agent the (\w+)\s+St:.*?HP:(\d+)\((\d+)\).*?$", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if agent_full_status_match:
        agent_full_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(0).strip()
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent full status line: {agent_full_status_line}")
        
        agent_hp_current = int(agent_full_status_match.group(2))
        agent_hp_max = int(agent_full_status_match.group(3))
        perceived_features.append(f"Agent HP: Current={agent_hp_current}, Max={agent_hp_max}")
        
        agent_class_from_status_line = agent_full_status_match.group(1) 

    # 2. Extract agent's current position and class
    # Prioritize "Yourself a [class]" for location and often more specific class
    if not is_agent_dead and not character_reset_event: 
        agent_pos_match_class = re.search(r"Yourself a (\w+)\n\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text)
        if agent_pos_match_class:
            agent_class = agent_pos_match_class.group(1)
            agent_x = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(2))
            agent_y = int(agent_pos_match_class.group(3))
            agent_pos_reliable = True
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from 'Yourself a {agent_class}'): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class}")
        else: # 'Yourself a [class]' not found (e.g., during active prompt)
            cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
            cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
            if cursor_match:
                cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
                cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

            if cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None:
                # Classify active prompts early to determine if cursor is reliable agent position
                is_active_prompt_found_temp = False
                if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content or \
                   re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content) or \
                   re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content) or \
                   re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content) or \
                   re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
                    is_active_prompt_found_temp = True

                if is_active_prompt_found_temp:
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator during active prompt). Using cursor position as best estimate for current focus: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
                    agent_x, agent_y = cursor_x, cursor_y 
                    agent_pos_reliable = False # Position from cursor during prompt is an estimate, not truly reliable map position
                else: # Cursor position is available and it's not an active prompt, but 'Yourself a' wasn't there
                    agent_x = cursor_x
                    agent_y = cursor_y
                    agent_pos_reliable = True
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent actual position (from cursor, no 'Yourself a [class]' indicator): (x={agent_x}, y={agent_y})")
                
                # If agent_class wasn't set by 'Yourself a [class]', use the one from the status line
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, 'Yourself a [class]' not found)")
            else:
                perceived_features.append("Agent actual position: Not reliably determined (missing 'Yourself a [class]' indicator and cursor coordinates).")
                if not agent_class and agent_class_from_status_line:
                    agent_class = agent_class_from_status_line
                    perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class} (from status line, no reliable position)")
    else: # Agent is dead or respawned
        if agent_class_from_status_line: # Agent class from status line is available even on death/respawn
             perceived_features.append(f"Agent class: {agent_class_from_status_line} (from status line, agent dead or respawned)")
        cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
        cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
        if cursor_match:
            perceived_features.append(f"Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position. Cursor visible at: (x={cursor_x}, y={cursor_y}).")
        else:
            perceived_features.append("Agent is dead or respawned. No reliable agent map position or cursor visible.")


    # --- Map and Cursor parsing for agent position and visible stairs ---
    map_content = ""
    map_match = re.search(r"map:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if map_match:
        map_content = map_match.group(1).strip()

    # Re-extract cursor info here if needed for stairs, as previous might have been for agent_pos_reliable logic.
    cursor_x, cursor_y = None, None
    cursor_match = re.search(r"cursor:\s*\n.*?\(x=(\d+), y=(\d+)\)", observation_text, re.DOTALL)
    if cursor_match:
        cursor_x = int(cursor_match.group(1))
        cursor_y = int(cursor_match.group(2))

    # Initialize stairs locations
    visible_stairs_down = None # > symbol
    visible_stairs_up = None # < symbol

    if map_content and cursor_x is not None and cursor_y is not None and agent_x is not None and agent_y is not None:
        lines = map_content.split('\n')
        # Assuming cursor_x, cursor_y represent the absolute map coordinates of the '@' symbol
        # and the 'map:' section is a view centered around it.
        # This part of the logic needs to be careful: the perception module does *not* know map dimensions,
        # so inferring absolute positions of '>' based on a partial map and cursor is tricky.
        # The prompt states: "Use the '@' symbol and the 'Yourself a [class]' line for determining the agent's current true location."
        # And "when 'Yourself a [class]' is absent, the cursor position serves as the best estimate".
        # So agent_x, agent_y is the current best estimate of the agent's *absolute* map position.
        # We need to find the char AT the agent's absolute map position, if visible in the map snippet.
        
        # Calculate cursor's relative position within the map snippet
        # The map snippet is usually 21x80. If the 'map:' section means the full raw level map is given,
        # then absolute (x,y) conversion would be direct.
        # Based on example maps, it's a snippet.
        # Let's assume the agent_x, agent_y coordinates ARE the coordinates of the @ symbol on the map displayed relative to (0,0) of game world.
        # To find stairs at agent's position, we just need to check the current map character at agent's *relative* location within the map snippet.
        
        # For this, we assume the '@' in the map snippet corresponds to `agent_x, agent_y`.
        at_symbol_relative_x, at_symbol_relative_y = -1, -1
        for r_idx, line in enumerate(lines):
            try:
                c_idx = line.index('@')
                at_symbol_relative_x = c_idx
                at_symbol_relative_y = r_idx
                break
            except ValueError:
                continue

        if at_symbol_relative_x != -1 and at_symbol_relative_y != -1:
            # Check the character at agent's current true location from map snippet
            char_at_agent_pos = lines[at_symbol_relative_y][at_symbol_relative_x]
            if char_at_agent_pos == '>':
                visible_stairs_down = (agent_x, agent_y)
            elif char_at_agent_pos == '<':
                visible_stairs_up = (agent_x, agent_y)

    if visible_stairs_down:
        perceived_features.append(f"Stairs (down) visibly found at agent's current location: (x={visible_stairs_down[0]}, y={visible_stairs_down[1]}).")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No Stairs (down) visibly found on current map view.")
    if visible_stairs_up:
        perceived_features.append(f"Stairs (up) visibly found at agent's current location: (x={visible_stairs_up[0]}, y={visible_stairs_up[1]}).")
    else:
        perceived_features.append("No Stairs (up) visibly found on current map view.")

    is_active_prompt_found = False
    turn_consumed = True # Default assumption for non-prompt messages and actions

    # Classify active prompts
    if "What do you want to use or apply?" in message_content:
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: apply_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False # Item selection does not consume a turn
    elif re.search(r"In what direction\?", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: directional_input_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False # Directional input prompt itself doesn't consume turn, subsequent action will
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to drink\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: quaff_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False # Item selection does not consume a turn
    elif re.search(r"\[[ynqYNQ]+\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: yes_no_quit_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False 
    elif re.search(r"What do you want to zap\? \[([a-zA-Z*? ]+)\]", message_content):
        is_active_prompt_found = True
        message_classifications.append("active_prompt (type: zap_item_selection_prompt)")
        turn_consumed = False # Item selection does not consume a turn
    
    # Classify other specific messages that are not prompts
    if not is_active_prompt_found:
        if "You can't go down here" in message_content or "The stairs are solidly fixed to the floor" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("blocked_stairs_message")
        if "Never mind." in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("action_cancelled_message")
        if "What?" in message_content or "Unknown command" in message_content or "I don't understand that." in message_content or "You can't do that." in message_content or "Your previous output did not contain a valid action. Retry" in message_content:
             message_classifications.append("invalid_action_message")
             turn_consumed = False # Invalid actions do not consume a turn (policy).
    
    perceived_features.append(f"Message classifications: {', '.join(message_classifications)}.")
    perceived_features.append(f"Turn_consumption_status: {turn_consumed}")


    # 3. Identify items explicitly on the ground (via "You see here:")
    you_see_here_match = re.search(r"You see here:\n([\s\S]*?)(?=\n\ncursor:|\n\nmap:|\n\nAgent the \w+|$)", observation_text)
    if you_see_here_match:
        ground_content = you_see_here_match.group(1).strip()
        if ground_content:
            ground_item_matches = re.findall(r"([a-zA-Z]) - ([^\.\n]+)", ground_content)
            for char, desc in ground_item_matches:
                full_item_desc = f"{char} - {desc.strip()}"
                items_on_ground_explicit.append(full_item_desc)
        
    if items_on_ground_explicit:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items explicitly on the ground (from 'You see here:'): {', '.join(items_on_ground_explicit)}")
    else:

    for item_desc in items_on_ground_explicit:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars:
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)
            
    for item_desc in items_on_ground_inferred_from_message:
        char = item_desc[0]
        if char not in identified_inventory_items_chars: # Redundant check if inference was correct, but safe.
            potential_pickup_items_raw.append(item_desc)

    items_to_pickup = sorted(list(dict.fromkeys(potential_pickup_items_raw))) # Deduplicate and sort

    any_items_to_pickup_on_ground = bool(items_to_pickup)
    if items_to_pickup:
        perceived_features.append(f"Items to pickup from ground (not in inventory): {', '.join(items_to_pickup)}")
```
